articles.title: ‘Had drinks’: Karnataka tourist ignores warning, swept away while sitting on rocks at Goa beach
articles.description: A tourist's holiday in Goa turned tragic after he ignored safety warnings and his friend's pleas, losing his life at Baga beach. Ashpaq Masali, 34, reportedly consumed alcohol before attempting a daredevil stunt on slippery rocks, only to be swept away by a powerful wave. Despite rescue efforts, his body was later recovered. Authorities had previously advised against venturing near the sea during the monsoon due to hazardous conditions.

articles.title: 2,004 calls, 238 hours & one final 'signal': How Pune businessman's murder unfolded
articles.description: A chilling conspiracy has emerged in the death of real estate businessman Ketan Agarwal, allegedly orchestrated by his fiancée Siya Goyal and her lover Chetan Chaudhary. Investigators revealed months of secret communication and repeated attempts to lure Agarwal to Lohagad Fort before his fatal fall. CCTV footage and phone records point to a meticulously planned murder, with earlier attempts reportedly failing.

articles.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's parents arrive in Belfast ahead of potential India debut
articles.description: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the youngest ever selected for India's men's team, is poised for a potential international debut against Ireland. His rapid rise, marked by a record-breaking List A fifty and a stellar IPL 2026 season, has generated immense excitement. With his parents present in Belfast, fans eagerly await his first cap, a dream fulfilled for the 15-year-old prodigy.

articles.title: Watch: Venezuela, Japan and California shaken by powerful quakes within hours
articles.description: A day of powerful seismic activity saw major earthquakes strike Venezuela, Japan, and California. Venezuela experienced the most devastating impact with twin quakes causing fatalities and building collapses. Japan's northeast coast was hit by a strong tremor, while northern California also registered a significant quake. Experts confirm these events are unrelated, occurring on separate fault lines.

articles.title: "It's a piece of s**t": Streamer Clavicular sparks backlash after brutal France rant goes viral
articles.description: Streamer Clavicular has sparked controversy after criticizing France during a livestream following his visit. He complained about poor Wi-Fi, infrastructure, roads, cleanliness, and his overall experience, saying he had hoped to enjoy the country but left disappointed. The viral clip divided social media, with some viewers agreeing that he was sharing his personal experience, while others criticized him for making sweeping remarks about France and its people.

articles.title: "She knows she's lying": Candace Owens draws backlash after linking Erika Kirk's behavior to mental health claims
articles.description: Candace Owens has sparked online controversy after suggesting Erika Kirk's behavior and changes to her signature indicated a mental health condition. During a viral discussion, Owens questioned Kirk's past statements and personality changes, prompting widespread criticism on social media. Many users argued it was inappropriate to speculate about someone's mental health without evidence, while others defended Owens' comments. Neither Erika Kirk nor Charlie Kirk had publicly responded to the remarks at the time.

articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: Rajasthan RSSB declares VDO final result 2026, merit list published for 850 Gram Vikas Adhikari posts; download PDFs here
articles.description: Rajasthan RSSB VDO final result 2026: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB), Jaipur, has declared the final result for the Gram Vikas Adhikari (VDO) recruitment examination conducted for 850 vacancies. The final result was released on June 24, 2026, following the written examination and subsequent selection process. The recruitment was open to candidates qualified in the CET (Graduation Level)-2024. The vacancies were distributed across Non-Scheduled and Scheduled Areas, with category-wise reservations implemented as per the recruitment notification.

articles.title: NEST 2026 result announced at nestexam.in; scorecard download link to be activated on June 30
articles.description: NEST 2026 Result: NISER and UM-DAE CEBS announced the NEST 2026 results on June 24, 2026, while scorecards will be available for download from June 30 at 2 PM through the official website. Candidates can access their results using their application number or user ID and password. The authorities have also released Section-wise Minimum Admissible Scores (SAMS). Qualified candidates will be eligible for counselling and admission through the forthcoming merit list process.

articles.title: RVUNL Recruitment 2026: Short notice for 2,005 JE, JA and Accountant vacancies released; check here
articles.description: RVUNL Recruitment 2026: Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (RVUNL) has announced a recruitment drive for 2,005 vacancies across five Rajasthan power companies. The openings include Junior Engineer-I, Junior Accountant and Junior Assistant/Commercial Assistant-II posts. A detailed notification and application schedule will be released in the second fortnight of July 2026. Eligible candidates aged 18 to 28 years can apply online. The selection process includes a written examination, document verification and medical examination.

articles.title: TS SSC Supplementary Result 2026 out today; marks memo available at bse.telangana.gov.in
articles.description: The Board of Secondary Education, Telangana has declared the TS SSC Supplementary Result 2026 for students who appeared in the Advanced Supplementary Examinations held from June 5 to 12. Candidates can check their results and download updated marks memos using their hall ticket numbers through official portals. The marks memo contains subject-wise scores, grades and qualifying status. Students who pass can apply for Intermediate admissions, while unsuccessful candidates must appear in future supplementary examinations.

Students who pass can apply for Intermediate admissions, while unsuccessful candidates must appear in future supplementary examinations.

articles.title: Tom Bower says Meghan Markle and Prince Harry are 'crawling back' to Britain
articles.description: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry's upcoming UK visit sparks debate, with biographer Tom Bower suggesting a "crawl back" driven by financial woes and Harry's isolation. Bower claims their business ventures faltered, pushing them to seek royal reconciliation for fame and status. Despite King Charles's reported offer of accommodation, a warm reception is questioned, with Buckingham Palace wary of commercial exploitation.

articles.title: Akshay's witty message to critics ahead of 'Welcome 3' release
articles.description: In anticipation of the 'Welcome to the Jungle' release, Akshay Kumar has humorously suggested that critics and influencers should replace traditional star ratings with laughter emojis, setting an entertaining mood for the film. Directed by Ahmed Khan, this latest addition to the 'Welcome' saga features an impressive ensemble cast and promises to deliver a new twist when it opens in cinemas on June 26.

articles.title: How Princess Diana's loss still impacts Prince Harry
articles.description: The untimely passing of Princess Diana has seemingly left a profound impact on Prince Harry, particularly in his interactions with the public. Observers pointed out his discomfort during wedding festivities, contrasting dramatically with Meghan Markle’s natural charisma in the spotlight. Recent anniversary photos further underscore this disparity, with Harry appearing to seek solace away from public attention, perhaps a lasting reflection of his mother's turbulent experience with the media.

articles.title: Meena Kumari biopic: Script is based on 2000 handwritten letters
articles.description: In an exciting development, director Siddharth P Malhotra has wrapped up the screenplay for 'Kamal Aur Meena', a biopic centered on the legendary Meena Kumari. This captivating story weaves together insights gathered from more than 2000 personal letters and diary excerpts exchanged between her and her spouse, Kamal Amrohi, providing a profound glimpse into their unique bond and the artistry behind 'Pakeezah'.
